title: Lively Grass Block
description: Added more variations and texture connections to the grass block, and redrawn the grass block texture
body:
# What did it do
Added more variations and texture connections to the grass block, and redrawn the grass block texture.
# Include
1.Four leaf clover, flowers, stones, and leaves randomly appearing on the grassland🍀

2.Better grassblock texture connection🍃

Please refer to the gallery for details🖼️
![grassblock](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/953081b45d0b191ebecc38580c6a982900392334.png)
